title: Super Bheem
subTitle: 1. Hokey has stolen a suitcase and Super Bheem and friends have to get it back. Little did they know that the munchies that Kalia had brought along would be of help. 2. Babu Babu is frustrated with Jwala's strictness and turns him into a hyper kid.

title: Super Bheem
subTitle: 1. Super Bheem and gang have to help Nattu, solve his weird problem, which is trying to be kind at heart. 2. Super Bheem's friends have a sleepover but the dragons don't sleep as they're awaiting the sun. The sun has to appear.
